backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images), user profiles, and CRUD operations for saving/loading/deleting diagrams with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features related to removing copy/paste behavior from the free transform tool and ensuring consistent transform behavior across all node types in AttackPathCanvas.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, utilities, and configuration files for the threat hunting portal application with attack path visualization.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for a security-focused design aesthetic.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Example code snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, and protected routes for report and attack path pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component handling icon placement, connections, drawings, text labels, images, free transform tool, multi-element selection with drag-to-select, and various editing modes with mouse event handlers.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG-based arrow connector component rendering lines between diagram elements with rotation support, selection highlighting, and click handling.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, mapping IconType to image assets and handling drag-and-drop events with fallback text display.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a toolbar for attack path diagram editing with icon selection, drawing tools (pen, line, arrow, text, eraser, move), text formatting controls, and image upload functionality with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, hero banner on homepage, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams, displaying diagram metadata (icons, connections, text labels, last modified), with delete confirmation and selection handling.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache, only visible when user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login interface using Internet Identity authentication with security messaging and loading states for the Threat Hunt Portal.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with support for custom technique entries, displaying technique IDs, names, and descriptions with badge UI.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for threat hunt reports using the pdfGenerator utility, showing loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, using a non-dismissible dialog with form validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field, supporting keyboard shortcuts and loading states.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication with Internet Identity, initializing access control with admin tokens, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing the complete state of an attack path diagram including icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drawing tools, selection state, and undo history with a 50-state limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, automatically invalidating the all diagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend, enabled only when the actor is initialized and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile, with custom loading state handling that accounts for actor initialization and no retry on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID, enabled only when the actor is available and not currently fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get, save, delete) with local DetailedReport type definitions, though all backend methods are disabled/stubbed out.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving the current user's profile via the actor, invalidating the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook for persisting diagram state by name, invalidating both diagramState and allDiagrams queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using oklch color space, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page component for creating attack path diagrams with toolbar controls, canvas rendering, and state management for icons, connections, drawings, text labels, and images with save/load/clear functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component with a form for creating new threat hunt reports, handling submission via useSaveReport mutation and navigating back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report with sections for executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation, and recommendations, plus PDF download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of all threat hunting reports with metadata, MITRE techniques count, IOCs count, and actions (view, download PDF, delete). Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state UI.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable HTML document for threat hunting reports, opening it in a new window with styled sections for metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and analysis content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and cleanup methods.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar colors, custom animations, typography plugin, and container queries support.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata indicating this is a fix request for a threat hunting portal, with features focused on removing copy/paste behavior from a free transform tool and ensuring consistent behavior across diagram node types.
